title: Practice Basic Wound Care
description: Learn to clean and bandage minor cuts safely.

dialogue.text: Minor scrapes happen. We'll practice cleaning and dressing them with your first aid kit. If it's deep or bleeding heavily, seek medical help instead.
Wash your hands, put on gloves, gently rinse the wound with clean water, dab on antiseptic from the kit, then cover it with a sterile bandage.
Great job! Keep the wound clean and dry, change the dressing daily, and watch for infection.
